title: cynometra ramiflora subsp. genuina
intro: Cynometra ramiflora subsp. genuina, also known as the Burut tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynometra ramiflora subsp. genuina include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots are also used in traditional medicine preparations.
